use_cases: Display customer testimonials in an interactive stacked card layout with swipe navigation
Showcase social proof with gradient-themed testimonial cards featuring user stats and quotes
Enable drag-based testimonial browsing for product review sections
Present featured customer feedback with tag categorization in glass-morphism style
ai_summary: A glass-morphism testimonial swiper component that displays customer testimonials in a stacked card layout. Features drag and swipe navigation between cards, gradient backgrounds with blur effects, and supports touch and mouse interactions. Designed for showcasing social proof on landing pages and product sections across SaaS, e-commerce, and portfolio sites.
